case_title: WOLFF, HERBERT VS LANDO, DESTA MARIE WHITE (DOES 1- 10) et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,112.62 FILED BY WOLFF, HERBERT AS TO DEFENDANT LANDO, DESTA MARIE WHITE  (DOES 1- 10) THE HERTZ CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

SUBPEAN DUCES TECUM AS TO THE HERTZ CORPOATION POS FILED.

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $250.00 FILED BY LANDO, DESTA MARIE WHITE  (DOES 1- 10) THE HERTZ CORPORATION AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT WOLFF, HERBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOLFF, HERBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANDO, DESTA MARIE WHITE  (DOES 1- 10) THE HERTZ CORPORATION $1,112.62 PRINCIPAL, $27.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,139.62 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LANDO, DESTA MARIE WHITE  (DOES 1- 10) THE HERTZ CORPORATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT WOLFF, HERBERT PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
INVALID POS ON BERBERT WOLFF. DATE OF EXECUTION OF POS NOT INDICATED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LANDO, DESTA MARIE WHITE  (DOES 1- 10) THE HERTZ CORPORATION
